meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Beat Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with the Antigravity project template. An advanced, step-by-step checklist using Claude Code to launch your first real-world SaaS.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start architecting. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you bypass boilerplate fatigue and jump straight into high-level logic. Use Claude Code to automate the scaffolding, allowing you to focus on unique value propositions, scalable architecture, and building a portfolio that actually gets you hired.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hundreds of hours watching polished creators build perfect apps, yet your own screen remains a cursor blinking against an empty file. This is the 'Tutorial Hell' trap—a psychological feedback loop where consumption masquerades as progress. You aren't learning to build; you are learning to mimic.

Today, we shatter that cycle. We are moving beyond the tutorial by adopting the Antigravity project template, a high-velocity framework designed for rapid deployment. By combining this architectural foundation with the raw power of Claude Code, you will stop being a student of code and start becoming an engineer of systems.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Establish a production-ready repository structure that enforces separation of concerns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project template with TypeScript, Next.js, and Supabase integration, ensuring a clean folder structure for modular services.

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Entities
steps.description: Stop thinking in files and start thinking in business logic. Map your database schema to your application state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the data models for a SaaS user dashboard using the Antigravity schema definition syntax, including roles, subscription tiers, and activity logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate schema models based on SaaS dashboard requirements'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Routes
steps.description: Ensure end-to-end type safety using the template's built-in RPC capabilities to eliminate runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a type-safe CRUD API route for the user dashboard using the Antigravity handler pattern, ensuring Zod validation is applied to all request bodies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create secure API handlers for user profile updates'

steps.title: Automate UI Component Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to bridge the gap between design specs and functional React components using your template's design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a responsive dashboard layout component using the Antigravity UI library, integrating the previously defined data hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build responsive dashboard shell with sidebar and header using tailwind'

steps.title: Stress-Test with Synthetic Data
steps.description: Validate your architecture by simulating real-world usage patterns before writing a single line of manual test code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a synthetic data generation script within the Antigravity testing suite to populate the DB with 50 diverse user profiles and activity logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and run seed script for development database'

pro_tips: Treat your project template as a product: version your boilerplate to iterate on your own architectural preferences over time.
Always run Claude Code with a specific 'context file' that outlines your project's coding standards to ensure consistent output quality.
Avoid the urge to over-engineer; if a feature doesn't directly contribute to the core user value, strip it out during the scaffolding phase.
Use the Antigravity 'dry-run' feature on every major refactor to catch dependency conflicts before they break your build chain.
Focus on shipping the 'happy path' first; complex error handling and edge cases should be the final 10% of your build process, not the start.
content.next_steps: Once your core MVP is functional, focus on deploying to a staging environment and implementing automated CI/CD pipelines to ensure every commit is production-ready.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace 99% of self-taught developers. The only variable left is your persistence. Stop watching, start shipping, and make your mark on the ecosystem. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
